text: What is your full name at birth?
What day, month, and year were you born?
What city and state were you born in?
What was the name of the hospital where you were born?
What time of day were you born, if you know?
How much did you weigh when you were born?
What was your mother's full name?
What was your father's full name?
What did your parents do for a living when you were little?
What street or house do you remember living on first?
Do you remember the house you lived in when you were about 3?
What about the house or town when you were 5?
And when you were 7 — where were you living then?
How many siblings do you have and what are their names?
Where do you fall in the birth order — oldest, middle, youngest?
What were your grandparents' names on your mom's side?
What were your grandparents' names on your dad's side?
Did your family have any pets when you were growing up? What were their names?
What is your earliest childhood memory?
What was your favorite toy or game as a little kid?
Which branch of the military did your dad serve in?
Did your brother serve in the military too? Which branch?
What was your dad like — how would you describe him in one sentence?
What was your mom like — how would you describe her in one sentence?
What did your family eat for Sunday dinner growing up?
Who were your closest aunts and uncles?
Which cousins were you closest to?
Where did your family go for holidays like Christmas or Thanksgiving?
What was a favorite family tradition when you were young?
Did your family ever have a big family reunion? Where was it?
What holiday was most special to your family growing up?
What Christmas gift do you still remember getting as a child?
Did your family go to church? Which one?
What was a favorite meal your mom made?
Did your dad have a nickname for you?
What chores did you have around the house?
How did your family celebrate birthdays?
What kind of car did your family drive when you were a kid?
Did you take family road trips? Where to?
What TV shows did your family watch together?
What was the name of your elementary school?
Who was your favorite elementary school teacher?
What was the name of your middle or junior high school?
What was the name of your high school?
What year did you graduate from high school?
What was your favorite subject in school?
What subject did you find hardest?
Did you play any sports or do cheerleading? Which ones?
Who was your best friend in high school?
Did you have a favorite teacher in high school? What was their name?
What did you wear to prom? What color was the dress?
Who did you go to prom with?
Were you in any clubs at school?
What music did you listen to in high school?
What was your school mascot?
Did you have a favorite spot to hang out with friends?
What was the best thing about high school?
What did you want to be when you grew up, back then?
Did you go to any dances besides prom? Homecoming? Sweetheart?
Did you get in any trouble at school? What for?
How did you first meet Tim?
How old were you when you met Tim?
What grade were you in when you started dating him?
Where was your first date with Tim?
What did you do on that first date?
Where was your first kiss with Tim?
What did you like most about Tim when you first met him?
What did your parents think of Tim at first?
What kind of car did Tim drive when you were dating?
What was a favorite place you two went together?
Did you have a song when you were dating?
How did Tim propose to you?
Where was he when he proposed?
How old were you when you got engaged?
How long were you engaged before the wedding?
What did Tim call you as a nickname?
What was the funniest thing that happened while you two were dating?
Did you two ever break up and get back together?
What did Tim do for a living when you started dating him?
Who told you first that Tim was the one?
What was your very first car — make, model, and color?
How old were you when you got your driver's license?
Who taught you how to drive?
Did you pass your driving test on the first try?
What was your first job?
How much did that first job pay?
What did you spend your first paycheck on?
What was your favorite job you ever had as a young person?
Do you remember your first speeding ticket or fender bender?
What was the first thing you saved money to buy?
Did you ever hitchhike or take a road trip with a friend?
What was your first apartment or place away from home?
How did you feel the first night you slept away from your parents' house?
Did you have a roommate? Who was it?
What was the first thing you cooked for yourself?
How did you get around before you had a car?
Did you ever pay off a big purchase or debt on your own — what was it?
What was the scariest thing about being on your own?
What was the best thing about being on your own?
Did you ever wish you could go back and live at home again?
What college or nursing school did you attend?
What year did you start nursing school?
Why did you decide to become a nurse?
What was your major or program of study?
What year did you graduate from nursing school?
Where was your first nursing job?
What kind of nursing did you do — floor, ER, pediatric, other?
Who was your favorite instructor in nursing school?
Do you remember your first patient?
What was the hardest part of nursing school?
What did you wear as a nurse back then — cap, uniform, colors?
Did you have a favorite doctor you worked with?
What's a patient story you still remember?
What was the funniest thing that happened at work?
What was the hardest shift you ever worked?
How much did you earn at your first nursing job?
Did you ever consider a different career?
What's something you learned in nursing that you still use today?
Who was your best friend from work back then?
What made you proudest about being a nurse?
What day, month, and year did you and Tim get married?
Where was your wedding?
Who was your maid of honor?
Who was Tim's best man?
What color were the bridesmaids' dresses?
What was your first dance song?
Where did you go on your honeymoon?
What's a funny memory from your wedding day?
Where was your first home together?
What was that first home like — apartment, house, size?
How many houses have you and Tim lived in together?
Which was your favorite house?
What states have you lived in as a married couple?
Which move was the hardest?
Which move was the most exciting?
What was the first big thing you bought together?
What was your first anniversary like?
What's a lesson from marriage you'd tell a young couple today?
What's Tim's most annoying habit that you still love him for?
What's your favorite thing about being married to Tim?
How many children do you have and what are their names?
What year was your first child born?
What hospital was your first child born in?
What year was your second child born?
What hospital was your second child born in?
If you have more kids, what years and where were they born?
What is a funny story about one of the kids as a baby?
Which kid was the hardest to put to bed?
Which kid was the pickiest eater?
What was the family car when the kids were little?
Did the family have a dog when the kids were little? What was its name?
What's a favorite family vacation you remember with the kids?
Where did you take the kids camping or on summer trips?
What was your parenting style — strict, easygoing, somewhere in between?
What's a birthday party for one of the kids that you still remember?
Which kid was the biggest troublemaker growing up?
Which kid made you laugh the most?
What did you cook that all the kids loved?
What are you proudest of as a mom?
If you could tell the kids one thing they should always remember, what would it be?
How many grandchildren do you have and what are their names?
What year was your first grandchild born?
What year was your youngest grandchild born?
What do the grandkids call you — Grandma, Nana, something else?
What's a favorite memory with one of the grandkids?
What do you love doing most with the grandkids?
Do you have a favorite grandkid story you tell over and over?
What's a special treat you make for the grandkids when they visit?
How many pets have you had over the years?
Can you name your pets over the years — dogs, cats, others?
Which pet was your absolute favorite and why?
What breed of dog have you loved most?
Did any of your pets do something hilarious you still remember?
Did any of the kids or grandkids beg you for a pet you said no to?
What's the funniest name you ever gave a pet?
Do you talk to your pets like they understand you?
What's a hard lesson one of the grandkids taught you?
What's the best advice you'd give your grandkids?
What do you hope the grandkids remember about you?
What's a family tradition you started with the grandkids?
What was your favorite song in your 20s?
What was your favorite song in your 30s?
What's a movie you could watch over and over?
What's your favorite meal to cook?
What's your favorite meal someone else cooks for you?
What's your favorite dessert?
What's a hobby you've loved for a long time?
Do you have a favorite Bible verse or prayer?
When did faith become important to you?
What church have you loved the most over the years?
What's the biggest life lesson you'd pass on?
What are you proudest of in your whole life?
What's still on your bucket list?
Where would you love to travel that you haven't been yet?
What's a small thing that always makes you happy?
If you could relive one day of your life, which day would it be?
What are you most thankful for right now?
What do you want people to say about you when you're gone?
What's the secret to a long, happy marriage?
What does turning 80 feel like?
